q: When you vote on election day, what do you do?
q_fa: در روز انتخابات هنگام رأی دادن چه می‌کنید؟
options: Go to the voting station, tell them who you are and mark your X. Give the ballot back to the attendant.
Go to the voting station, remove 1 ballot and after marking your X deposit it in the ballot box.
Go to the voting station, take your voter's card with proof if identity, highlight your choice on the ballot and deposit it in the box.

Go to the voting station with your voter's card and ID, mark an X next to your chosen candidate, fold the ballot and present it to the poll officials who will tear off the ballot number and give you the ballot to deposit in the box.
book_text: Follow poll workers' instructions: ID, mark the ballot, fold, and deposit it properly.
q_fr: Le jour du vote, que faites-vous ?
options_fr: Vous présenter, cocher et rendre le bulletin à l'agent.
Prendre un bulletin, cocher et le déposer.
Carte électorale et pièce d'identité, surligner et déposer.
Carte et pièce d'identité, cocher, plier, remettre aux agents puis déposer dans l'urne.
expl_fr: Procédure officielle en bureau de vote.

q: Where do most French-speaking Canadians live?
q_fa: اکثر فرانکوفون‌های کانادا کجا زندگی می‌کنند؟
book_text: The majority of French speakers in Canada live in Quebec.
q_fr: Où vivent la plupart des francophones au Canada ?

q: Which Act granted, for the first time in Canada, legislative assemblies elected by the people?
q_fa: کدام قانون نخستین بار مجلس‌های قانونگذاری منتخب مردم را در کانادا ایجاد کرد؟
book_text: The Constitutional Act of 1791 divided the Province of Quebec and provided for elected assemblies.
q_fr: Quel acte a institué les premières assemblées élues au Canada ?

q: Which country borders Canada on the south?
q_fa: کدام کشور در جنوب کانادا همسایه است؟
book_text: Canada shares its southern border with the United States.
q_fr: Quel pays borde le Canada au sud ?

q: Which federal political party is in power?
q_fa: کدام حزب فدرال در قدرت است؟
book_text: The governing party changes with elections; this slide keys the Liberal Party.
q_fr: Quel parti fédéral est au pouvoir (jeu) ?

q: Which of the following statements about residential schools is NOT true?
q_fa: کدام گزینه دربارهٔ مدارس شبانه‌روزی درست نیست؟
options: The federal government placed many Aboriginal children in residential schools to educate and assimilate them into mainstream Canadian culture.
The schools were poorly funded and inflicted hardship on the students.
The schools were welcomed by the Aboriginal people.
Aboriginal language and cultural practices were mostly prohibited.
book_text: Residential schools were imposed and harmful; they were not welcomed by Aboriginal peoples.
q_fr: Laquelle de ces affirmations sur les pensionnats est fausse ?
options_fr: Ottawa y a placé de nombreux enfants pour assimilation.
Les écoles étaient sous-financées et dures pour les élèves.
Les peuples autochtones les ont accueillis avec joie.
Langues et cultures autochtones étaient surtout interdites.

q: Which party is the Official Opposition at the federal level?
q_fa: کدام حزب اپوزسیون رسمی در سطح فدرال است؟
book_text: The Official Opposition is the party with the second-most seats; this slide keys the Conservative Party.
q_fr: Quel parti est l'opposition officielle à Ottawa ?

q: Which region covers more than one-third of Canada?
q_fa: کدام ناحیه بیش از یک‌سوم کانادا را پوشش می‌دهد؟
book_text: The North (territories) covers a very large share of Canada's land area.
q_fr: Quelle région couvre plus du tiers du Canada ?

q: Which region is known as the industrial and manufacturing heartland of Canada?
q_fa: کدام ناحیه قلب صنعتی و تولیدی کاناداست؟
book_text: Central Canada (especially Ontario and Quebec) is a major industrial and manufacturing region.
q_fr: Quelle région est le poumon industriel du Canada ?

q: Which region of Canada is known for both its fertile agricultural land and valuable energy resources?
q_fa: کدام ناحیه هم زمین کشاورزی حاصل‌خیز و هم منابع انرژی دارد؟
book_text: The Prairies combine extensive farmland with significant oil and gas resources.
q_fr: Quelle région allie terres agricoles fertiles et ressources énergétiques ?

q: Which was the last province to join Canada?
q_fa: آخرین استانی که به کانادا پیوست کدام بود؟
book_text: Newfoundland and Labrador was the last province to join Confederation (1949).
q_fr: Quelle province a rejoint le Canada en dernier ?

q: Who are the Quebecers?
q_fa: کِبِکوا کیستند؟
book_text: Quebecers are the people of Quebec, including French-speaking majorities and others.
q_fr: Qui sont les Québécois et Québécoises (jeu) ?

q: Who had played an important part in building the Canadian Pacific Railway (CPR)?
q_fa: چه کسانی در ساخت راه‌آهن کانادای اقیانوس آرام نقش مهم داشتند؟
book_text: Many Chinese labourers helped build the CPR under difficult conditions.
q_fr: Qui a beaucoup contribué à la construction du CPR ?

q: Who have major responsibilities on First Nations reserves?
q_fa: در ذخایر اول ملت‌ها چه کسانی مسئولیت اصلی دارند؟
book_text: Band councils, led by chiefs and councillors, exercise many local responsibilities on reserves.
q_fr: Qui a des responsabilités majeures dans les réserves ?

q: Who is General Sir Arthur Currie?
q_fa: سر آرتور کری کیست؟
options: A military leader of the Métis in the 19th century.
Canada's greatest soldier in the First World War.
book_text: Sir Arthur Currie was a senior Canadian commander during the First World War.
q_fr: Qui était le général sir Arthur Currie ?
options_fr: Chef militaire métis au XIXe siècle.
Grand soldat canadien de la Première Guerre mondiale.
expl_fr: Commandant canadien de la Grande Guerre.

q: Who is the leader of the Federal Official Opposition Party?
q_fa: رهبر حزب اپوزسیون رسمی فدرال کیست؟
book_text: Opposition leadership changes; this slide keys Pierre Poilievre.
q_fr: Qui dirige l'opposition officielle à Ottawa (jeu) ?

q: Who led an armed uprising and seized Fort Garry?
q_fa: چه کسی شورش مسلحانه کرد و فورت گری را گرفت؟
book_text: Louis Riel led the Red River Resistance, including the seizure of Fort Garry.
q_fr: Qui a mené un soulèvement armé et pris Fort Garry ?

q: Who led Quebec into Confederation?
q_fa: چه کسی کبک را به کنفدراسیون آورد؟
book_text: Sir George-Étienne Cartier was a key Quebec leader in Confederation.
q_fr: Qui a mené le Québec vers la Confédération ?

q: Who was Sir Sam Steele?
q_fa: سر سام استیل کیست؟
options: A great frontier hero, Mounted Policeman and soldier of the Queen.
A military leader of the Métis in the 19th century.
The first Prime Minister of Canada.
book_text: Sam Steele was a famous North-West Mounted Police officer and military figure.
q_fr: Qui était sir Sam Steele ?
options_fr: Héros de la frontière, policier à cheval et soldat de la Reine.
Chef militaire métis au XIXe siècle.
expl_fr: Figure de la Police à cheval du Nord-Ouest.
